rationale: The citing paper uses Tsiros and Irmak (2020) in its methods section as a concrete example when coding study-design characteristics (studies without explicit target product/service detail). In a meta-analysis, primary studies are part of the empirical input, and this citation indicates direct use of that study in the evidence-construction process rather than only background listing. The paper does not position itself as extending or challenging that single study's theory, so the substantive role is methodological/evidentiary inclusion.
relation_description: The citing meta-analysis incorporates the cited paper as one of the primary CM studies informing its coded dataset and effect-size synthesis. It is specifically referenced to illustrate a design feature used in the meta-analytic control coding.
